headline: 痴迷登顶，末日地堡热度飙升
summary: 今日娱乐新闻：新片上映为零，但《痴迷》持续领跑，《末日地堡》《福尔摩斯小姐3》紧随其后。行业关注《气体人第一号》与《金特务》回归。
summaryEn: No new releases today, but 'Obsession' leads trending, followed by 'Silo' and 'Enola Holmes 3'. Industry eyes 'The First Gas Man' and 'Gold Agent' return.

industryHighlights.text: 本周无新片上映，暑期档预热中
industryHighlights.en: No new releases this week, summer season warming up
The Devil Wears Prada 2 holds weekly chart

industryHighlights.text: 《超级少女》与《龙族》持续受关注
industryHighlights.en: Supergirl and House of the Dragon remain hot
Avatar: The Last Airbender and more upcoming
